name: form-rhf-radiogroup

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## form-rhf-radiogroup
**Type:** registry:example
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** react-hook-form, @hookform/resolvers, zod

visual_summary: The form-rhf-radiogroup component is a controlled RadioGroup component from the react-hook-form library. It is used to create radio buttons where only one option can be selected at a time. This is suitable for when you need a simple selection of options within a form.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: form-rhf-radiogroup
Description: The form-rhf-radiogroup component is a controlled RadioGroup component from the react-hook-form library. It is used to create radio buttons where only one option can be selected at a time. This is suitable for when you need a simple selection of options within a form.
Style: 
Interactions: clickable
Tags: form, radio-buttons, controlled-component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
